parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  account_name,
  COUNT(ticket_id)                        AS open_ticket_count,
  MIN(DATE(created_at))                   AS oldest_ticket_date,
  COUNTIF(status = 'open')                AS open_count,
  COUNTIF(status = 'pending')             AS pending_count
FROM `guesty-data.zendesk_analytics.tickets_clean`
WHERE status IN ('open', 'pending')
  AND created_at < TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
  AND account_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY account_name
ORDER BY open_ticket_count DESC
